name: Access a Product via category after applying multiple filters

steps.name: Given I am on the eBay homepage
When I navigate to Electronics > Cell Phones & Smartphones
And I apply filters for Condition, Price, and Location
Then I should see the filters applied correctly

labels.value: Apply filters to access products on eBay
